description_long: This object is a modern laptop computer with a slim, rectangular form factor and a hinged clamshell design. The upper section features a large display screen, which is currently showing static or visual noise, reminiscent of a television with no signal. The lower section contains a full-sized keyboard with a trackpad below it, and the keys are arranged in a standard QWERTY layout. The laptop's exterior is primarily silver and black, with a smooth, hard surface finish typical of aluminum or high-quality plastic. No visible brand logos or stickers are present on the lid, palm rest, or keyboard area. The laptop appears to be closed on the sides, with no visible ports or connectors.
description: A sleek, silver and black laptop with a static-filled screen and a standard keyboard, featuring a smooth, hard exterior and no visible branding or stickers.
description_view_0: The laptop is viewed from an angle showing the left side of the keyboard and the screen displaying static, with the hinge and part of the palm rest visible.
description_view_1: This front-facing view highlights the full keyboard layout, trackpad, and the static-filled screen, providing a clear look at the main interactive surfaces.
description_view_2: The right side of the laptop is visible, showing the thin profile of the screen and keyboard, with the static display prominent.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the open screen, with the static display visible but no ports, logos, or other features apparent.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying static or visual noise with no discernible content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and standard keys; no numeric keypad is visible.
